svg.title: Spark execution model: Action triggers Job, split into Stages, each Stage into Tasks
svg.desc: An action like count() triggers a Job. A shuffle boundary splits the Job into Stages. Each Stage is divided into Tasks, one per partition.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a Spark action? Give examples.')
sendPrompt('What happens in Stage 1 before a shuffle?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Stage 2 after a shuffle?')

svg.text: ↑ shuffle boundary — stage 1 must complete before stage 2 starts
